procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1537
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1537 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

command: Import-Module '/opt/invoke-atomicredteam/Invoke-AtomicRedTeam.psd1' -ErrorAction Stop; $env:PathToAtomicsFolder='/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics'; try { bash -lc "if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update -y >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; apt-get install -y inetutils-telnet ldap-utils lsof mlocate smbclient samba-common-bin dnsutils >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! command -v b64encode >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v base64 >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nbase64 "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/b64encode && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/b64encode; fi" } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] dependency bootstrap failed'; }; try { Invoke-AtomicTest T1537 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1 -GetPrereqs -ErrorAction Continue } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] GetPrereqs failed for T1537'; }; Invoke-AtomicTest T1537 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1

sigma.title: Github Fork Private Repositories Setting Enabled/Cleared

osquery.name: t1537_exfil_net
osquery.query_text: SELECT p.pid, p.name, p.cmdline, s.remote_address, s.remote_port FROM process_open_sockets s JOIN processes p ON s.pid = p.pid WHERE s.remote_address != '' AND s.remote_address NOT LIKE '127.%' AND s.remote_address NOT LIKE '10.%' AND s.remote_address NOT LIKE '192.168.%' LIMIT 100;

sigma_matches.title: Github Fork Private Repositories Setting Enabled/Cleared

executions.reason: Materialized real SOAR execution for persisted MITRE evidence
Materialized real SOAR execution for persisted MITRE evidence
Materialized real SOAR execution for persisted MITRE evidence
Materialized real SOAR execution for persisted MITRE evidence

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 11 direct run(s), 6/6 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
